author: Josip Markus
description: Fold and unfold the active note's outline to a chosen depth (levels 1-6) with hotkey-bindable commands. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Josip Markus
manifest.description: Fold and unfold the active note's outline to a chosen depth (levels 1-6) with hotkey-bindable commands.
manifest.name: Outline Level Fold

name: Outline Level Fold

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Automated release built and attested in CI. The attached assets carry GitHub build-provenance attestations; verify with: gh attestation verify main.js --repo josipmarkus/obsidian-outline-level-fold

releases.author: josipmarkus
releases.description: Selection-scoped folding: with text selected, Fold to level N acts only on the selection, at a depth relative to it. Non-destructive unfold preserves hand-folded code blocks. New "Outline: Mixed" status-bar state for uneven folds. Code blocks are skipped (Obsidian does not render folds inside them). Install assets: main.js, manifest.json.
releases.name: Outline Level Fold 0.3.1

releases.author: josipmarkus
releases.description: Fold and unfold the active note's outline to a chosen depth (levels 1-6) with hotkey-bindable commands, plus a live status-bar indicator. Install assets: main.js, manifest.json.
releases.name: Outline Level Fold 0.2.5
